basic_details.short_information: Intelligent Communication Systems India Ltd has released the official Management Trainee Notification 2026 at the official website. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced under the ICSIL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 32 years with a qualification of B.Com / CA Inter / CMA Inter can attend the walk-in interview on 07 July 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available on the official portal.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 32 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.details: Management Trainee: Candidates must have a degree of B.Com/CA Inter/CMA Inter. They must also have knowledge of Tally/Accounting work.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download ICSIL Management Trainee Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download ICSIL Management Trainee Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ICSIL Management Trainee Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ICSIL Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download ICSIL Management Trainee Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ICSIL Management Trainee Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Management Trainee: Candidates must have a degree of B.Com/CA Inter/CMA Inter. They must also have knowledge of Tally/Accounting work.

content_sections.heading: ICSIL Management Trainee Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 32 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: ICSIL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for ICSIL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required. Candidates are advised to make payment of One Time Registration (OTR) Fee before the Walk-In-Interview. Only those candidates who have registered online and made one time registration fee of Rs. 590/- (non-refundable) on ICSIL website will be entertained for walk-in interview. Applicant is mandatory to bring a proof of payment one time registration fee of Rs. 590/- (to be printed out from their manage profile) at the time of Walk-In interview.

content_sections.heading: ICSIL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for ICSIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The post name for the ICSIL Recruitment 2026 is Management Trainee. This is a contractual outsourced position.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Management Trainee post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies available for the Management Trainee post in this ICSIL recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Management Trainee role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a degree of B.Com, CA Inter, or CMA Inter to be eligible for the Management Trainee position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to the Management Trainee post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Management Trainee post is 32 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Management Trainee position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Management Trainee post will receive a salary of Rs. 24,356/- plus EPF.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this ICSIL recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this ICSIL recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly.

faq.question: Q7. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled for the Management Trainee posts?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview for the Management Trainee posts is scheduled to be held on 07 July 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application fee for the ICSIL Management Trainee recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 590/- (non-refundable) for all categories. This is a One Time Registration (OTR) fee.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, and proof of OTR fee payment.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the Walk-in Interview venue?
faq.answer: The venue for the Walk-in Interview is Intelligent Communication Systems India (ICSIL), located in New Delhi, Delhi, with pincode 110024.
